title: Parasitology and infectious disease
author: Shereen Fahmy
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This presentation provides an overview of medical parasitology and infectious diseases, focusing on the most common human parasites, their life cycles, modes of transmission, and diagnostic methods. It includes illustrations of protozoa and helminths, as well as updates on molecular diagnostic tools such as PCR and ELISA. The content aims to support students and researchers in understanding the key aspects of parasitology and related infectious diseases.
